relocation.package_summary: Anthropic offers comprehensive relocation support for new hires to San Francisco, including broker-managed moves, temporary housing for up to 30 days, flights, and a sign-on relocation bonus; lease-break assistance is case-by-case for Seattle-based candidates.
relocation.policy_notes: The company offers comprehensive visa sponsorship, including for US Green Cards, and retains an immigration lawyer to assist. However, some job postings mention relocation support specifically for those moving to the Bay Area.

benefits.healthcare: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision insurance for employees and their dependents. The company also offers a generous subsidy for OneMedical.
benefits.dental_vision: Delta Dental and VSP Vision, 100% employer-paid for basics, orthodontics covered up to $2,000
benefits.estimated_copay: $200-400/month for family coverage at $200k base, low deductibles under $1,000
benefits.meals_provided: Daily meals and snacks are provided for employees in the office.
benefits.mental_health: Mental health support is available for employees and their dependents.
benefits.other_perks: Includes 22 weeks of paid parental leave, flexible paid time off (most staff take 4-6 weeks), a $500/month flexible wellness and time saver stipend, commuter benefits, home office and education stipends, and fertility benefits via Carrot Fertility.

sentiment.blind_score: 4.2/5 + Positive on mission-driven culture but notes high workload in recent AI safety threads
sentiment.glassdoor_score: 4.4 / 5.0 (222 reviews). Key themes include a genuinely mission-driven culture focused on AI safety, high-impact work, and top-tier compensation. The lowest-rated area is work-life balance (3.7/5.0), with recurring notes about intensity and burnout risk during crunch periods.
sentiment.reddit_pulse: Recent sentiment is highly positive regarding the company's trajectory and the capabilities of its Claude models, especially in high-stakes fields like healthcare. Discussions acknowledge the intense, fast-paced environment but frame it as a function of the company's hypergrowth and mission. There are also forward-looking discussions about how AI will reshape work by 2026, with Anthropic's co-founder quoted.
sentiment.x_pulse: Founder and executive posts frequently center on the company's core mission of AI safety and responsible scaling. CEO Dario Amodei has been very public about the company's 'crazy' 80x revenue growth in early 2026, driven by enterprise adoption of Claude. There is significant public discussion around the company's hypergrowth, potential IPO in late 2026, and high-level strategy.

likely_recruiter.name: unknown
likely_recruiter.rationale: Search LinkedIn for recruiters at Anthropic with keywords like 'communications recruiter' or 'G&A recruiter'.

likely_hiring_manager.name: Sasha de Marigny
likely_hiring_manager.rationale: Sasha de Marigny was promoted to Chief Communications Officer in late 2025 and leads the communications team. Job descriptions for other communications roles state they report to the 'Head of Communications in the US'.

comp_corroboration.blind_thread_evidence: L5 Anthropic offer Feb 2026: $450K cash + $2.4M RSU/4yr — confirmed in https://teamblind.com/post/l5-anthropic-offers-in-feb-2026-q66l6kvu. Google v Anthropic non tech role Feb 2026: $180k base + estimated $250k TC for L5 ops role in https://teamblind.com/post/google-v-anthropic-non-tech-role-ajzhovoi.
comp_corroboration.x_twitter_evidence: Andrew Yeung Apr 2026 post: 'Anthropic is paying up to $400,000 a year for an events role' (https://x.com/andruyeung/status/2048545188608364593). Matt Vinson Apr 2026 post: 'Anthropic tender offer settled yesterday. Another $6bn in cash (up to $10m per employee)' (https://x.com/mattmvinson/status/2040507307466096822).
comp_corroboration.leveling_evidence: Levels.fyi data: For Software Engineer, $563K median TC for Senior (P25 $500K, P75 $650K); non-tech roles lower, e.g., ops ~$250K TC per Blind cross-ref (https://www.levels.fyi/companies/anthropic/salaries).
comp_corroboration.agreement_with_council: HIGH - Social signals confirm top-tier compensation with high equity grants aligning with council's assessment of strong TC packages.

benefits_corroboration.healthcare_signal: Glassdoor and BuiltIn reviews cite comprehensive health, dental, and vision insurance for employees and dependents (https://www.glassdoor.com/Benefits/Anthropic-US-Benefits-EI_IE8109027.0,9_IL.10,12_IN1.htm); no specific OneMedical subsidy mentioned.
benefits_corroboration.mental_health_signal: BuiltIn mentions additional mental-health support in benefits overview, but no specifics on EAP/Lyra/Spring (https://builtin.com/company/anthropic/faq/compensation-benefits).
benefits_corroboration.agreement_with_council: HIGH - Matches council's description of comprehensive healthcare, though OneMedical subsidy lacks confirmation.

sentiment_corroboration.blind_recent_posts: Last 90 days show positive sentiment on comp and mission (e.g., Feb 2026: 'Anthropic beats OpenAI' in https://teamblind.com/blog/blind-tl-dr-anthropic-prevails-interview-cheats-and-tc-blindness-feb-20-2026; Apr 2026 offer discussions highlight high equity); some notes on workload but overall top-rated company (https://www.teamblind.com/blog/best-companies-to-work-for-in-the-u-s-2026-anthropic-netflix-and-google-lead).
sentiment_corroboration.x_team_signal: Charly Wargnier Mar 2026 post: 'What Anthropic has shipped so far in 2026 is just insane... @AnthropicAI is on an absolute, once-in-a-lifetime tear' praising culture and output (https://x.com/DataChaz/status/2033096562805485969).
sentiment_corroboration.reddit_signal: r/womenintech (2026): '60-80+ hour weeks were the norm for technical and nontechnical roles alike' on high workload (https://www.reddit.com/r/womenintech/comments/1sdhob9/anthropic_work_culture_for_nontechnical_roles).
sentiment_corroboration.biggest_red_flag_in_socials: Reddit and Blind mentions of 60-80+ hour weeks and potential Amazon-style toxic culture influx (e.g., https://www.teamblind.com/post/anthropic-culture-is-now-fcked-uav7o4m1).
sentiment_corroboration.biggest_green_flag_in_socials: Blind ranks Anthropic as top company for 2026 with mission-driven culture and high-impact work (https://www.teamblind.com/blog/best-companies-to-work-for-in-the-u-s-2026-anthropic-netflix-and-google-lead).
sentiment_corroboration.agreement_with_council: HIGH - Aligns with 4.2/5 Blind rating, positive mission-driven culture, and noted high workload/WLB issues.

people_corroboration.named_employees_posting: no named employees observed posting about research communications team in last 90 days
people_corroboration.hiring_team_visibility: MEDIUM — Job postings on LinkedIn visible, but limited public X/LinkedIn presence from specific research comms leadership.
